## Hypothesis

The vwap_overnight_grinder output indicates that the top keeper has a wide_pnl of $587.72 and an edge_capture of $40.01, with a win rate of 0.833. This suggests that there may be a genuine edge in the VWAP-anchored entry sweep, particularly in the wide_pnl and edge_capture metrics.

## Mechanism

The mechanism for this candidate involves using a VWAP-anchored entry sweep, where the entry is triggered based on the VWAP (Volume Weighted Average Price) of the SPY. The sweep involves varying the parameters of the VWAP calculation, such as the lookback period and the threshold for the entry trigger.
